templates.name: Mutual NDA – Standard Terms
templates.description: Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (MNDA) Standard Terms, allowing each party to disclose and protect confidential information for a defined purpose.

templates.name: Mutual NDA – Cover Page
templates.description: Cover Page for the Common Paper Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement, used to capture party details and modifications and incorporate the MNDA Standard Terms by reference.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement (CSA) covering access, use, support, and terms for providing a cloud (SaaS) service to a customer.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for giving early-access partners access to a product in exchange for feedback and participation in a development program.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement (SLA) defining uptime targets, how availability is calculated, and related service commitments for a cloud service.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement (PSA) governing the delivery of professional services under statements of work.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement (DPA) covering processor and subprocessor relationships and the processing of personal data on behalf of a customer.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement granting a customer a license to install and use software for permitted uses.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement setting out each party's obligations and the terms of a business partnership.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement giving a customer time-limited access to a product for evaluation purposes during a pilot period.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement (BAA) addressing HIPAA obligations and the permitted use and disclosure of protected health information (PHI).

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum supplementing an agreement to cover the use of AI services, including input, output, and related restrictions.
